location: Lying on a corpse in the shallow lake on northern Gravesite Plain, directly in front of a sleeping (inactive) Ghostflame Dragon. It sits west of the Abandoned Ailing Village Site of Grace — no fight is required, you can walk up and grab it, then leave without waking the dragon.

source.name: Corpse beside the sleeping Ghostflame Dragon (world pickup, no fight required)

tactics: You do NOT need to defeat the Ghostflame Dragon guarding the spot — it's asleep, and the weapon is simply lying on a corpse nearby; grab it and retreat if you don't want the fight.
Approach carefully if you want to avoid aggroing the dragon; sprinting straight through the water can wake it.

Comes pre-equipped with the Ash of War Overhead Stance, which is otherwise unavailable on this weapon since it's the only one of the three Great Katanas that can be reforged/infused with a different affinity.
lore: A large, heavy-bladed katana associated with warriors of a homeland called the Land of Reeds. It rewards committing your whole body into each swing rather than finesse, and its slashes build blood loss.

builds.name: Dexterity Bleed
builds.why: DEX scaling far outweighs STR, so a DEX-focused bleed build extracts the most attack rating; being infusable also lets it take Occult or other affinities for status-stacking builds.
